Conflict.PlayerJudderFix.Note: Rest In Patches already smooths player movement. Player Judder Fix is redundant when both are installed.
Conflict.FootprintPerformance.Note: Rest In Patches already includes footprint fixes. Footprint Performance is redundant when both are installed.
cfg.keep_running_in_background.name: Keep Running In Background
cfg.keep_running_in_background.desc: Keeps the game simulating when its window isn't focused.
cfg.mute_when_unfocused.name: Mute When Unfocused
cfg.mute_when_unfocused.desc: Mutes all audio while the game window isn't focused.
cfg.smooth_player_movement.name: Smooth Player Movement
cfg.smooth_player_movement.desc: Smooths player movement with physics interpolation so it isn't tied to the pixel grid. Turn off to restore the game's original movement, for example if your character struggles to line up with interaction spots.
cfg.max_footprints.name: Max Footprints
cfg.max_footprints.desc: Maximum number of footprints kept before the oldest are removed. 0 disables the cap.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
